title: loeflingia hispanica subsp. gaditana
intro: Loeflingia hispanica subsp. gaditana, also known as Spanish or Andalusian Loeflingia, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Loeflingia hispanica subsp. gaditana include potential relief from digestive issues and menstrual cramps, as well as anti-aging properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
